RestaurantSettings.title: RestaurantSettings
RestaurantSettings.description: Global operational configurations, active delivery fees, currency and status of the restaurant.

deliveryFee.description: Flat rate cost for delivery orders

currency.description: Default visual currency symbol, e.g., JD

MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: An authentic food dish record published on the store's public digital menu.

id.description: The unique menu item key identifier

name.description: Local Arabic name of the dish

description.description: Delectable description or list of ingredients

price.description: Subtotal cost of the food item

image.description: Unsplash or asset vector image URL link

available.description: Is this article currently in stock or sold out

Order.title: Order
Order.description: A food order transaction completed or submitted by food lovers to the restaurant kitchen.

type.description: Fulfillment route, e.g., delivery, pickup, dine_in

items.description: List of subtotal items packed in this order detail

totalPrice.description: Grand total bill of the transaction

status.description: Order progression status, e.g., pending, completed

rating.description: Post-consumption rating stars and comment details

/settings/{settingsId}.description: Singleton location supporting active setting variables.

/menuItems/{itemId}.description: Authorized items list published on the storefront.

/orders/{orderId}.description: Database recording customer transactions and order statuses.
